'''chabobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyodermatitis|pyodermatitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyodermatitis|pyodermatitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chabobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæbebeth|chæbebeth]] || [[word:chæbebej|chæbebej]] || [[word:chæbebesh|chæbebesh]] || [[word:chæbebe|chæbebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chaboboboth|chaboboboth]] || [[word:chaboboboj|chaboboboj]] || [[word:chabobobosh|chabobobosh]] || [[word:chabobobo|chabobobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chaboboth|chaboboth]] || [[word:chaboboj|chaboboj]] || [[word:chabobosh|chabobosh]] || [[word:chabobo|chabobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chabofboth|chabofboth]] || [[word:chabofboj|chabofboj]] || [[word:chabofbosh|chabofbosh]] || [[word:chabofbof|chabofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chabobotho|chabobotho]] || [[word:chabobojo|chabobojo]] || [[word:chabobosho|chabobosho]] || [[word:chaboboko|chaboboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chaboboth|chaboboth]] || [[word:chaboboj|chaboboj]] || [[word:chabobosh|chabobosh]] || [[word:chabobo|chabobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chabobothol|chabobothol]] || [[word:chabobojol|chabobojol]] || [[word:chaboboshol|chaboboshol]] || [[word:chabobokol|chabobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chabobothotho|chabobothotho]] || [[word:chabobojojo|chabobojojo]] || [[word:chaboboshosho|chaboboshosho]] || [[word:chaboboko|chaboboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chabobothon|chabobothon]] || [[word:chabobojon|chabobojon]] || [[word:chaboboshon|chaboboshon]] || [[word:chabobokon|chabobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chabobothoro|chabobothoro]] || [[word:chabobojoro|chabobojoro]] || [[word:chaboboshoro|chaboboshoro]] || [[word:chabobokoro|chabobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
